name: Bubbles
description: Air rising through deep water — thin-walled bubbles in twos and threes, each with its gloss, re-released on every redraw.

code.style: --rim: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --rule: ( /* bubble and gloss share one emitted position so the highlight stays inside */ --bx: @r(8, 40); --byy2: @r(8, 40); --bd: @r(34, 56); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--bx) * 1%); top: calc(@var(--byy2) * 1%); width: calc(@var(--bd) * 1%); height: calc(@var(--bd) * 1%); border: calc(24px / @Y) solid var(--rim); border-radius: 50%; opacity: @rand(0.55, 0.95); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 700ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--bx) * 1% + @var(--bd) * 0.18%); top: calc(@var(--byy2) * 1% + @var(--bd) * 0.14%); width: calc(@var(--bd) * 0.22%); height: calc(@var(--bd) * 0.22%); border-radius: 50%; background: var(--color3); opacity: 0.8; transition: ease 700ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
